title: sclarea vulgaris
intro: Sclarea vulgaris, also known as clary sage, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its delicate blue flowers and grey-green leaves. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help soothe digestive issues and reduce stress. The health benefits of clary sage include improving sleep quality, reducing anxiety and depression, and alleviating menstrual cramps. Clary sage can be prepared as a tea, essential oil, or tincture, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and calmness.
